info.english_meaning: to be thirsty to be desirous
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: kOmudyAm ' Yi tfzA ' iti AkArAntaH pAWaH dfSyate  mEtreyasammataH pAWaH ayam  paraM tu kzIrataraNgiRI-mA.DA. vftti- DAtukAvyavyAKyAnAdizu ' tfza ' ityeva pAWaH dfSyate  AditPalam tu nizWAyAm izRizeDaH
